questions.question: First published before Boomers were born (gasp), this Tolkien novel got the blockbuster treatment like Lord of the Rings did years earlier.
This "always learning" rover landed on Mars in 2011, and discovered the presence of water molecules in 2012.
Name the musical group that won Grammy Awards for their albums The Open Door EP and Kintsugi.
At the end of 2006, this former dictator was hanged for crimes against humanity.
Name the book/movie with the phrase, "You is kind. You is smart. You is important."
